title: 熱い誓い！　アタシはヒーローになる！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after school, as I'm walking near the
academy entrance...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Biko! Heya!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Heya, Mayano! You done training, too?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I got bor—I mean, yep! ♪ Wanna hang out?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Sure! Let's head to the shopping district. I know a
pretty cool place!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait! A toy store?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
How old do you think I am? I stopped playing
with toys ages ago!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're never too old for toys, silly! C'mon, this
way!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
See? All these superheroes have been loved by
grown-ups for countless generations!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Well, I watched Magical ☆ Derby Girl
when I was a kid, so I wouldn't know anything
about that!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Is that right? You know, Derby Girl is a hero too!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
As long as they have a heart for justice, anyone
can be a hero! That's what Carrot Ranger said
when she was climbing a mountain.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Climbing a mountain?! Why would she do that?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Glad you asked! It's because Carrot Ranger
doesn't just beat up bad guys!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
She puts her body to the test and pushes herself
to the limit. And everyone who sees this is filled
with courage!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's hang-gliding, cheerleading, or
skiing, no matter how many times she falls, she
gets right back up!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! Can you feel that?! Carrot Ranger's so
cool, it's giving me chills!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...I feel like I've heard enough about Carrot
Ranger for an entire lifetime.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You really like her, don't you, Biko?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! No injustice slips by her, no matter how
small! And no hardship can make her cower!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Carrot Ranger fights to protect everyone's hopes
and dreams. She's my hero!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I race to win. I want to be a hero
that inspires others to be brave too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Hmmm... I think my goals are a bit cuter and
more mature, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Now I get what your dream is!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You'll see, Mayano! I'm going to become a
great hero someday!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And I'm gonna grow up into a super chic woman! I'll transform with my catchphrase, "Magical ☆ Miraculous ☆ Debut! ☆" Hehe, JK! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
If you're a Derby Girl, then I'll be have to use my
secret weapon! "Nutritious! Virtuous! Carotene
Charge!"
